---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea to improve AutoFuse
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

A clear, concise description of the feature.

## Problem It Solves

What's the current pain point or limitation?

## Use Case

How would you use this feature? Provide an example:

1. I want to...
2. So that I can...
3. Currently I have to...

## Proposed Solution

How would this feature work? What would the UI/CLI look like?

```
Example:
autofuse sync --watch ~/workstation
```

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways to solve this?

## Additional Context

- Screenshots or mockups (if applicable)
- Similar features in other tools
- Priority: High / Medium / Low
- Frequency: Daily / Weekly / Occasionally

## Related Issues

Links to similar feature requests or bugs
